subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was indeed illustrious, and its meanings were as gems and pearls, for it betokened attraction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه نامی بود و معانی جواهر و لئالی زیرا دلیل انجذاب بود و
